sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91899" key="purw/teros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρ-ώτερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="comp" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Comp. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυρρός</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
